/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/cc -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/dsda_rdatawad.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/dsda_rdatawad.dir/rd_main.c.o CMakeFiles/dsda_rdatawad.dir/rd_util.c.o CMakeFiles/dsda_rdatawad.dir/rd_output.c.o CMakeFiles/dsda_rdatawad.dir/rd_sound.c.o CMakeFiles/dsda_rdatawad.dir/rd_palette.c.o CMakeFiles/dsda_rdatawad.dir/rd_graphic.c.o -o rdatawad
